title: Subagent handover envelope
description: Mandatory envelope at the top of every skill-loading subagent return. Pairs the return with its in-flight registry entry. Includes optional dispatch-mode + parallel-wave-size fields that the harness validator inspects on cycle-1 (journey-mapping) and pass-1 (coverage-expansion) returns to reject grouped or single-agent-collapsed first-cycle/first-pass work.

role.description: Role slug. Pattern guidance: kebab-case, optionally with journey suffix.

cycle.description: Cycle number within the role's dispatch loop (accepts integer or numeric string).

dispatch-mode.description: How the dispatch was structured. REQUIRED on returns for cycle 1 of journey-mapping or Pass 1 of coverage-expansion. The harness validator rejects cycle-1 / pass-1 returns whose dispatch-mode is `grouped` or `single-agent-collapsed` — those first cycles/passes are strict-per-X by contract. `per-journey` applies to coverage-expansion composers/probes; `per-section` applies to journey-mapping section agents; `grouped` covers `[group]` / `[P3-batch]` wrappers; `single-agent-collapsed` is the anti-pattern of a single subagent doing the work of an entire wave.

parallel-wave-size.description: Size of the parallel wave this dispatch was part of. When `dispatch-mode == per-journey` or `per-section`, must be ≥ 1. On cycle-1 / pass-1, the harness rejects returns with `parallel-wave-size == 1` UNLESS the roster genuinely contains only one item (in which case `dispatch-mode: per-journey` with wave-size 1 is correct).
